raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Metro Green Line extension to Torrance will help cut down on traffic on freeways and local roads.",
    "The Metro Green Line extension will get more people on public transit.",
    "The Metro Green Line extension is expected to cut down on air pollution and greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "LA Metro plans to connect the proposed Torrance Metro station to LAX, providing a commuting alternative for South Bay residents.",
    "The state is delivering $231 million in funding to expedite the Metro Green Line extension to Torrance.",
    "The Metro Green Line extension project is one of the largest project grant recipients in the State Transportation Agency’s Transit and Intercity Rail Capital Program.",
    "The Los Angeles Region Transit System Integration and Modernization Program will focus on the construction of six new transit corridor projects.",
    "The Program will increase the existing Metro light rail and bus rapid transit networks by approximately 60 miles.",
    "Once completed, the Program will connect all parts of Los Angeles County, including the Hollywood Burbank Airport and Los Angeles International Airport."
  ]
}
```
